name: MAPLE
downloadable: none (releases a checkpoint and code, not annotations)
license: no license file in repo (default all rights reserved)
suitability: descriptive-only: encodes contact and hand-pose priors from egocentric video, nothing clusterable
focus_en: Learns vision-encoder features that predict object contact points and grasping hand poses at contact from egocentric images, reused to train dexterous manipulation policies.
focus_cn: 从第一人称图像学习视觉编码器特征，预测物体接触点与接触时刻的抓握手姿，并复用于训练灵巧操作策略。
datapath_en: MAPLE mines large-scale egocentric human video from Ego4D to extract hand-object interaction supervision, then trains a vision encoder so that features from a single egocentric frame predict object contact points and the 3D MANO grasping hand pose at the moment of contact. The frozen encoder's features, combined with robot hand proprioception, drive a Transformer diffusion policy for dexterous manipulation. MAPLE produces visual and kinematic priors only; it releases a checkpoint and code but no language annotations.
datapath_cn: MAPLE 从 Ego4D 大规模第一人称人类视频中挖掘手-物交互监督，训练一个视觉编码器，使单帧第一人称图像的特征能够预测物体接触点以及接触时刻的 3D MANO 抓握手姿。冻结后的编码器特征与机器人手部本体感知结合，驱动一个用于灵巧操作的 Transformer 扩散策略。MAPLE 只产出视觉与运动学先验；它发布检查点与代码，但不发布语言标注。
flow_en: train encoder to predict contact and grasp pose
Transformer diffusion policy for dexterous manipulation
flow_cn: 挖掘 Ego4D 第一人称片段
提取接触点与手姿监督
训练编码器预测接触与抓握姿态
冻结编码器特征 + 机器人状态
用于灵巧操作的 Transformer 扩散策略
no_corpus_en: MAPLE is a representation-learning method, not an annotation source. Its supervision and outputs are geometric (contact points and 3D hand poses), with no language or text annotations, and it reuses Ego4D video under that dataset's license. The repository ships no license file (default all rights reserved), so this atlas documents MAPLE descriptively rather than clustering downloaded strings.
no_corpus_cn: MAPLE 是一种表征学习方法，而非标注来源。其监督与产出均为几何量（接触点与 3D 手姿），不含任何语言或文本标注，并在 Ego4D 数据集许可下复用其视频。仓库未附带许可文件（默认保留所有权利），因此本图谱以描述性方式记录 MAPLE，而非对下载的字符串进行聚类。
example_credit: MAPLE, Gavryushin et al., ETH Zurich, 2025
example_caption_en: MAPLE learns contact and grasp priors from Ego4D egocentric video; the project page shows the teaser and contact-point results.
example_caption_cn: MAPLE 从 Ego4D 第一人称视频学习接触与抓握先验；项目主页展示概览图与接触点结果。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2504.06084 and github.com/algvr/maple (no license file; default all rights reserved). Trains on Ego4D; evaluates contact prediction on EPIC-KITCHENS and EGTEA Gaze+.
citation: Gavryushin et al., MAPLE: Encoding Dexterous Robotic Manipulation Priors Learned From Egocentric Videos, arXiv:2504.06084 (2025).
